description: Description: Article dependency graph — BFS expansion with ref-type priority   (prerequisite > procedural > general > back_reference) replaces flat alphabetical CSV    sort. Dynamic multi-hop params: top-4 seeds, 2-hop depth, budget=5 for multi-hop       queries. Parallel Qdrant fetch via ThreadPoolExecutor. Baseline: run_23 (same config,    graph off). Hypothesis: multi-article recall improves as BFS prioritises   semantically relevant cross-refs over incidental ones.
